title: Vim Essential Motions & Commands
description: Core Vim commands and motions for efficient text editing.

entries.label: Save & Quit
entries.description: Write the file and exit Vim

entries.label: Visual Mode
entries.description: Select text by character, line, or block

entries.label: Search & Replace
entries.description: Replace all occurrences of pattern in the file

entries.label: Horizontal Split
entries.description: Split the window horizontally or vertically

entries.label: Yank & Paste
entries.command: yy (yank line)  |  p (paste after)  |  P (paste before)
entries.description: Copy and paste lines in Vim

entries.label: Record Macro
entries.description: Record, replay, and re-replay a macro into register a

entries.label: Substitute on Line
entries.description: Replace all matches on the current line

entries.label: Delete Around
entries.description: Delete inside/around word, parens, quotes, or paragraph

entries.label: Undo & Redo
entries.description: Undo the last change or redo an undone change
